steps.title: Identify the goal
steps.content: The student wants to identify the title of Hurston's first published short story. The notes provide the title: "John Redding Goes to Sea."

steps.title: Match the choice
steps.content:
Choice B states the title directly: Hurston's first published short story was "John Redding Goes to Sea."
  • A gives the year but no title
  • C gives the venue but no title
  • D describes the work without naming it
.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
